answer:
QuickBooks Online uses OAuth 2.0 as its standard authorization protocol for API access [1][2]. To authenticate, you must exchange your app's Client ID and Client Secret for an access token via the Intuit OAuth 2.0 server [1][3].

All API requests require an Authorization header containing this bearer token [4].

```http
Authorization: Bearer <your_access_token>
```

You can obtain tokens by directing users to an authorization URL generated using your credentials [5][6][2]. Access tokens are valid for 60 minutes and can be refreshed using a refresh token [5][6][7].
